heading: Public and commercial vessels and other watercraft; sale of fuel, supplies, and services
label: 942 Public and commercial vessels and other watercraft; sale of fuel, supplies, and services
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 654 of this title1966— inserted “Public and commercial vessels and other watercraft; sale of fuel, supplies, and services” in section catchline.Pub. L. 89–444
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 654 of this title1966— inserted “Public and commercial vessels and other watercraft; sale of fuel, supplies, and services” in section catchline.Pub. L. 89–444

children.text: to procure the fuel, supplies, or services from other sources at its present location; and
to proceed to the nearest port where they may be obtained without endangering the safety of the ship, the health and comfort of its personnel, or the safe condition of the property carried aboard.
